name: Rome: The Mystery of the Chronovisor - Hidden Objects
short_description: Rome never forgets. Explore immersive 360° panoramas, search for hidden objects, and unravel the mystery of the Chronovisor — a device said to replay the past. A four-chapter story set across Rome's most iconic landmarks. No ads. No microtransactions. Just the mystery.
detailed_description:
Rome never forgets. In 1962, a Vatican scholar revealed the existence of the Chronovisor — a device said to replay the past as if it's happening now. Then he vanished. The secret was buried for decades.

Rome: The Mystery of the Chronovisor is a hidden-object mystery told across four chapters. Search richly detailed 360° panoramas for cleverly hidden objects, collect rare artifacts, and piece together a story of ancient secrets, coded messages, and rooms that were never meant to be found.

The Investigation

Now, a coded note has surfaced in the Roman Catacombs — Alpha. Omega. Museum. I.— and your heroes follow it straight into a trap. The door seals behind them, and now it's up to you to uncover what Rome has been hiding.

Explore the Eternal City

Experience iconic locations in full 360°:

  • Trastevere's winding alleys and sunlit Flea Market

  • The chilling depths of the Catacombs

  • The majesty of Castel Sant'Angelo and the Roman Forum

  • The secret halls of the Vatican Museums

FEATURES

  • Immersive 360° Exploration: 10+ unique panoramas with crisp 3D detail — explore each scene from every angle.

  • Deep Narrative: A four-chapter mystery filled with clues, twists, and secret rooms.

  • Vast Content: 40+ seek-and-find scenes with hidden objects inspired by real antiques and artifacts.

  • Substantial Playtime: 8–10 hours of atmospheric gameplay across the full story.

  • Collect & Replay: Artifact collections, replayable scenes, and rewards for multiple playthroughs.

  • Atmospheric Soundtrack: An original score that captures the warmth and mystery of Rome.

  • Player Friendly: A built-in hint system and a complete, premium experience.

A Premium Experience

Buy once, explore everything. Every chapter, every scene, every secret — yours from the start. No ads, no microtransactions, no interruptions. Play at your own pace and lose yourself in the mystery.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Ukrainian, Czech, Japanese
